title: Apple's 41-Page Complaint Slams OpenAI, Why Did It Spare the Legendary Designer Yves?
excerpt: Apple Inc. has recently filed a lawsuit with the court, accusing OpenAI and its hardware subsidiary of stealing trade secrets by poaching employees and obtainin
content_html:
Apple Inc. has recently filed a lawsuit with the court, accusing OpenAI and its hardware subsidiary of stealing trade secrets by poaching employees and obtaining internal documents. In a 41-page complaint, several former executives and core engineers are named, but surprisingly, Jonathan Ive, the former chief designer, is not on the list.

Three Considerations to Avoid Key Individuals

Prominent tech journalist Mark Gurman conducted an in-depth analysis, pointing out that the primary reason Apple did not name Ive is his limited involvement. Although Ive participated in related hardware projects through his design company, he was not responsible for actual hiring or daily operations.

Additionally, deeper financial and personal relationships were also key factors in Apple's decision to avoid naming him. Ive has a close relationship with Jobs' widow, who not only invested in the involved hardware company, but her family name still holds significant special influence within Apple.

Considering Image to Avoid Public Backlash

In addition to personal considerations, public relations risks in court are also a factor Apple must weigh. In the post-Jobs era, Apple's strategic focus has gradually shifted towards operational efficiency and cost control, and the core position of design has significantly declined.

If Ive were involved in this lawsuit, the defense lawyers might take the opportunity during cross-examination to challenge him, forcing him to publicly discuss the changes and decline in Apple's design philosophy. This potential public storm would not help Apple win the case, but could instead cause secondary damage to the company's brand image.

sentences.en: Apple Inc. has recently filed a lawsuit with the court, accusing OpenAI and its hardware subsidiary of stealing trade secrets by poaching employees and obtaining internal documents.
sentences.zh: 苹果公司最近向法院提起诉讼，指控 OpenAI 及其硬件子公司通过挖角员工和获取内部文件的方式窃取商业机密。

sentences.en: In a 41-page complaint, several former executives and core engineers are named, but surprisingly, Jonathan Ive, the former chief designer, is not on the list.
sentences.zh: 在一份长达41页的投诉书中，列出了几位前高管和核心工程师的名字，但令人惊讶的是，前首席设计师乔纳森·艾维（Jonathan Ive）并未出现在名单中。

Although Ive participated in related hardware projects through his design company, he was not responsible for actual hiring or daily operations.

sentences.en: In the post-Jobs era, Apple's strategic focus has gradually shifted towards operational efficiency and cost control, and the core position of design has significantly declined.
sentences.zh: 后乔布斯时代，苹果的战略重点逐渐转向运营效率和成本控制，设计的核心地位明显下降。

This potential public storm would not help Apple win the case, but could instead cause secondary damage to the company's brand image.

sentences.zh: 如果艾维卷入这起诉讼，辩护律师可能会在盘问时趁机对他提出质疑，迫使他公开讨论苹果设计理念的变化和衰落。

sentences.en: This potential public storm would not help Apple win the case, but could instead cause secondary damage to the company's brand image.
sentences.zh: 这场潜在的公众风暴不仅不会帮助苹果赢得官司，反而可能对公司的品牌形象造成二次损害。

content_html_zh:
苹果公司最近向法院提起诉讼，指控 OpenAI 及其硬件子公司通过挖角员工和获取内部文件的方式窃取商业机密。 在一份长达41页的投诉书中，列出了几位前高管和核心工程师的名字，但令人惊讶的是，前首席设计师乔纳森·艾维（Jonathan Ive）并未出现在名单中。

避免关键人物的三个考虑因素

著名科技记者马克·古尔曼（Mark Gurman）进行了深入分析，指出苹果没有点名艾维的主要原因是他的参与程度有限。 虽然Ive通过他的设计公司参与了相关的硬件项目，但他并不负责实际的招聘或日常运营。

此外，更深层次的财务和个人关系也是苹果决定避免提及他的关键因素。 艾维与乔布斯遗孀关系密切，乔布斯遗孀不仅投资了涉案硬件公司，而且她的家族姓氏在苹果公司内部仍然拥有重大的特殊影响力。

考虑形象以避免公众强烈反对

除了个人考虑之外，法庭上的公关风险也是苹果必须权衡的因素。 后乔布斯时代，苹果的战略重点逐渐转向运营效率和成本控制，设计的核心地位明显下降。

如果艾维卷入这起诉讼，辩护律师可能会在盘问时趁机对他提出质疑，迫使他公开讨论苹果设计理念的变化和衰落。 这场潜在的公众风暴不仅不会帮助苹果赢得官司，反而可能对公司的品牌形象造成二次损害。
